# MediKloud

MediKloud is India’s first tech-driven managed hospital pharmacy operator. We help independent hospitals optimize their pharmacy operations, eliminate revenue leakage, and improve patient care through our zero-capex managed pharmacy model.

## Core Services
- **Managed Pharmacy Operations**: Specialized end-to-end pharmacy management for hospitals.
- **Free HMS (Hospital Management System)**: A comprehensive, tech-enabled hospital management solution.
- **Automated Medicine Deliveries**: Efficient and tech-driven medicine fulfillment.
- **Virtual Pharmacy Solutions**: Remote pharmacy management and digital integration.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://medikloud.com
- **Phone**: +91-7702670993
